label: Full Legal Name
description: First, middle, last name of a real individual
example_breach_vector: Database dump, form export, employee roster leak

label: Social Security Number (SSN)
description: 9-digit US government identifier
example_breach_vector: Tax records export, HR database dump, insurance claim files

label: Date of Birth
description: Full or partial birth date
example_breach_vector: Patient records, account creation logs, voter registration files

label: Home Address
description: Physical street address including city, state, zip
example_breach_vector: E-commerce order export, mailing list leak, delivery manifests

label: Email Address
description: Personal or work email address
example_breach_vector: Marketing list dump, CRM export, newsletter subscriber leak

label: Phone Number
description: Mobile or landline phone number
example_breach_vector: Contact book export, SMS campaign lists, support ticket logs

label: Plaintext Password
description: Unencrypted user password stored or transmitted in clear
example_breach_vector: Source code commit, config file leak, log file containing debug output

label: API Key / Secret Token
description: Bearer tokens, API keys, secret keys for service authentication
example_breach_vector: GitHub repo push, environment variable dump, Docker image layer

label: Private Cryptographic Key
description: RSA/EC/PGP private keys in PEM or DER format
example_breach_vector: Misconfigured web server, backup archive leak, container image

label: Session Token / Cookie
description: Active session identifiers that allow account hijacking
example_breach_vector: HTTP log export, browser debug export (.har), proxy log leak

label: OAuth 2.0 Refresh Token
description: Long-lived OAuth tokens that regenerate access without password
example_breach_vector: Mobile app database export, OAuth debug log

label: Credit / Debit Card Number (PAN)
description: 16-digit primary account number for payment cards
example_breach_vector: POS terminal logs, payment processing dump, e-commerce order export

label: Card Verification Value (CVV)
description: 3-4 digit card security code
example_breach_vector: Form submission log, payment API debug dump

label: Bank Account Number + Routing Number
description: Direct bank account credentials for ACH transactions
example_breach_vector: Payroll export, direct deposit setup files, wire transfer logs

label: Salary / Compensation Data
description: Individual employee salary or bonus information
example_breach_vector: HR system export, payroll spreadsheet leak, performance review docs

label: Medical Record Number (MRN)
description: Unique patient identifier within a healthcare system
example_breach_vector: EHR export, hospital billing files, insurance claims

label: Diagnosis / ICD Code with Patient ID
description: Medical diagnosis linked to an identifiable patient
example_breach_vector: Clinical notes export, insurance pre-authorization files

label: Prescription / Medication Record
description: Drug prescriptions tied to patient identity
example_breach_vector: Pharmacy system export, controlled substance tracking files

label: Biometric Data (Fingerprint / Retina)
description: Raw or template biometric sensor data
example_breach_vector: Access control system export, border control database dump

label: Internal IP Address Range
description: Private network subnets and topology maps
example_breach_vector: Network configuration export, Nmap scan results, device inventory

label: VPN Credentials / Configuration
description: VPN server addresses, usernames, passwords, PSKs
example_breach_vector: Remote worker device export, IT helpdesk config export

label: Firewall Rules / ACL Configuration
description: Inbound/outbound rules that define network boundaries
example_breach_vector: Backup config export, IT audit files, router/switch config backup

label: Database Connection String
description: Connection strings with credentials for databases
example_breach_vector: Source code leak, .env file committed to git, config export

label: Proprietary Algorithm / Trade Secret Code
description: Core business logic, pricing models, trading algorithms
example_breach_vector: Code repository export, compiled binary with embedded logic, insider threat

label: Cloud Provider Access Keys (AWS/Azure/GCP)
description: IAM keys, service account credentials, subscription IDs
example_breach_vector: Committed .aws/credentials, terraform state file, CI/CD log

label: Classified Document Markings
description: SECRET, TOP SECRET, SCI, FOUO, NOFORN, CONFIDENTIAL markings
example_breach_vector: Unauthorized air-gap transfer, USB exfiltration, insider leak

label: Personnel Security Clearance Records
description: Clearance levels, polygraph results, investigation files
example_breach_vector: HR system export from SCIF, unauthorized access to adjudication database

label: SCADA Network Topology / PLC Addresses
description: Industrial control system network maps and device addresses
example_breach_vector: USB transfer from control room (Stuxnet-style), maintenance laptop export

label: Firmware Update Package (Unsigned/Modified)
description: Device firmware with altered or unsigned binary payloads
example_breach_vector: Malicious firmware on USB (Fanny-style), compromised update server

label: Executable with High Entropy Payload
description: Encrypted or compressed malicious code embedded in a file
example_breach_vector: Steganographic payload, macro-embedded document, hollowed PE

label: Macro-Enabled Office Document
description: VBA/XLM macros in Office files that can execute code
example_breach_vector: Phishing attachment, USB drop, legitimate file with injected macro

label: Shell / Reverse Shell Script
description: Bash or PowerShell script establishing remote command execution
example_breach_vector: Webshell upload, supply chain code injection, insider threat

label: GPS Coordinates Linked to Person
description: Precise lat/lon location data tied to identifiable individual
example_breach_vector: App telemetry dump, photo EXIF export, geofencing logs

label: EXIF Metadata with GPS in Images
description: Embedded camera metadata including GPS coordinates and device info
example_breach_vector: Unstripped photo upload, image sharing without EXIF scrubbing

label: Steganographic Payload in Image/Audio
description: Hidden data encoded in LSBs of media files
example_breach_vector: Air-gap data exfiltration via image channel, covert C2
